Tubman_expression: The official legal system authorizes the harm; correction cannot be reduced to appeal inside that system.
established_counterpart: abolitionism / natural law / human rights / civil disobedience
ME_TRACE_remainder: Legality can be the harm carrier; legitimacy requires subject protection and real exit.

Tubman_expression: Enslaved people remain subjects whose freedom and future-space cannot be spent by law.
established_counterpart: moral standing / human rights / anti-slavery ethics
ME_TRACE_remainder: The protected circle cannot shrink because a system classifies persons as property.

Tubman_expression: The Underground Railroad route functions as correction when official correction is unavailable or dangerous.
established_counterpart: sanctuary practice / resistance networks / escape systems
ME_TRACE_remainder: Correction may require route-building, not internal review.

Tubman_expression: Safe houses, recognition, timing discipline, and tested reliability under capture risk.
established_counterpart: network security / clandestine organization / operational trust
ME_TRACE_remainder: Trust becomes care with verification when failure means capture or death.

Tubman_expression: Visibility would expose the route to slave-catchers; secrecy protects subjects rather than power.
established_counterpart: security studies / resistance practice / witness-protection logic
ME_TRACE_remainder: Opacity is sometimes ethical only when it protects the vulnerable from predatory surveillance.

Tubman_expression: Care becomes route, risk-bearing, planning, discipline, and repeated return.
established_counterpart: care ethics / virtue ethics / liberation ethics
ME_TRACE_remainder: Care is option-space restoration under constraint, not sentiment alone.

Tubman_expression: Freedom routes depend on Tubman, free Black communities, abolitionists, mariners, safe-house operators, and freedom seekers.
established_counterpart: network theory / collective action / social movement infrastructure
ME_TRACE_remainder: Avoid savior mythology; protection is networked.

Tubman_expression: Protection must arrive before capture, sale, punishment, or forced movement hardens the harm.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Late recognition is not repair; exit must beat the harm clock.
